title: astragalus senilis
intro: Astragalus senilis, also known as milk vetch or astragalus, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of China, Russia, and Eastern Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus senilis has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including fatigue, respiratory problems, and cardiovascular disease, and is believed to enhance the body's natural defenses against infection and stress. In herbal preparations, astragalus is often combined with other herbs to create teas, capsules, and tinctures that can be taken to support overall health and well-being.
